data.title: Arria NLG partners with Resolute for AI advancement in government and commercial sectors. Arria has 45 patents.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Arria NLG, a major player in Natural Language Generative AI and Agentic AI, and Resolute, a renowned advisory firm focused on dual-use technologies, defense innovation, and commercial strategy. Arria, which boasts a decade of experience, has successfully implemented its advanced AI system for numerous Fortune 500 firms and government bodies, such as the US Department of Defense. With a remarkable 45 patents under its IP portfolio, Arria is proud of this new collaboration with Resolute.

data.title: Palantir stock reaches record high after Q2 beat and raise, hitting all-time high on Thursday.
data.description: Following a successful Q2 performance, Palantir Technologies is experiencing a surge in stock value. The company's stock reached an unprecedented peak on Thursday, reflecting investor confidence in its recent achievements. This positive momentum comes in the wake of Palantir surpassing expectations and raising projections for the quarter. The impressive performance has resulted in significant market attention, with the stock hitting record numbers.

data.title: Chip stocks increased after President Trump's tariff comments, but Intel stock dropped. Market reacts.
data.description: Semiconductor stocks saw a surge on Thursday following President Donald Trump's positive comments regarding tariffs on the industry. However, Intel's stock experienced a decline amidst the market movement. This development came after President Trump's remarks, which led to a notable increase in chip stocks. Intel's stock, on the other hand, did not benefit from this trend and experienced a decrease in value.

data.title: Barings and Brennan Investment Group join forces to acquire $150M industrial outdoor storage assets, closed on 4.75-acre property in Denver.
data.description: Barings, a prominent real estate investment manager, has partnered with Brennan Investment Group to establish a joint venture program. This venture aims to procure $150 million worth of Industrial Outdoor Storage (IOS) assets initially. As part of this initiative, the joint venture has successfully finalized the acquisition of a 4.75-acre property comprising two buildings in Denver, CO. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in their shared investment strategy.

data.title: Clari and Salesloft to merge, forming a Revenue AI powerhouse serving 5,000+ organizations globally, managing $10 trillion annually.
data.description: A merger has been confirmed between Revenue Orchestration leaders Clari and Salesloft, based in Sunnyvale, California and Atlanta, respectively. This strategic agreement establishes a dominant Revenue AI entity revolutionizing the collaboration between individuals and agents to manage revenue streams. With a combined reach of more than 5,000 organizations worldwide spanning various sectors, the new company will oversee a staggering $10 trillion in annual revenue from major enterprise clients such as Adobe, IBM, 3M, Zoom, and Shopify.

data.title: Aderant acquires HerculesAI legal technology assets to boost AI capabilities in work-to-cash solution.
data.description: In Atlanta, Aderant revealed that they are set to acquire the legal technology assets from HerculesAI after signing a definitive agreement. This move signifies a strategic decision by Aderant to enhance its offerings in the legal tech industry. Specific details about the deal, such as financial terms and the exact assets involved, have not been disclosed to the public. This acquisition is expected to have a significant impact on the legal tech sector, consolidating Aderant's position in the market.

data.title: Mirantis partners with Pico Public Cloud to launch first sovereign public cloud in Bangladesh.
data.description: Mirantis, based in Campbell, California, has collaborated with Pico Public Cloud, an affiliate of Fiber@Home, to establish Bangladesh's inaugural sovereign public cloud service.
